 var k=\"cellarr-theme\";\n  var c=null;try{c=localStorage.getItem(k);}catch(e){}\n  if(c!=='light'&&c!=='dark'&&c!=='system')c='system';\n  var dark=c==='dark'||(c==='system'&&window.matchMedia&&window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches);\n  var b=document.body;\n  b.classList.remove('theme-light','theme-dark');\n  b.classList.add(dark?'theme-dark':'theme-light');\n  b.style.colorScheme=dark?'dark':'light';\n}catch(e){}})();"}}],["$","$L2",null,{"children":["$","$L3",null,{"parallelRouterKey":"children","template":["$","$L4",null,{}],"notFound":[[["$","title",null,{"children":"404:
